git-commands.title: 13 Git Commands Every Developer MUST Know 🔥 (Animated)
git-commands.description:
Stop memorizing — START understanding.

Every git command you actually need, explained with animations in 60 seconds.

⏱️ Timestamps:
00:00 git init
00:05 git clone
00:10 git add & commit
00:15 git push & pull
00:20 git branch
00:25 git merge
00:30 git status & log
00:35 git stash
00:40 git bisect
00:45 git reflog
00:50 git cherry-pick
00:55 git blame
01:00 git worktree

💡 Most devs only use 5 of these. The rest will save you HOURS.
